Get to know your customers with forms worth filling out

Collect all the data you need to understand customers with forms designed to be refreshingly different.

Get started—it's free

Typeform helps you understand customers

Forms, surveys, and quizzes

Get up to 3.5x more data about them

When your forms break the norm, more people fill them out. Think branded designs, video content, and relevant follow-up questions.

Sign up

Customer Intelligence

Use that data to guide your next move

What led customers to you. Their opinions. How they decide what to buy. Data can tell you a lot and our AI analysis can help you make sense of it all.

Sign up
Read on

“We need to know that we're building the right things for real problems.”

Chase Clark, Senior UX Researcher at Calm, explains why they switched to Typeform.

Read on

With a superior form of data collection

Designed to attract

Your forms will look anything but ordinary. Customize the entire design, embed it in all the right places, and strike a chord with engaging video content.

Gathers deeper insights

More data is just a follow-up question away. Encourage customers to elaborate by asking questions based on their previous answers.

Prioritizes unique data

Some data is harder to come by. Collect readily-available data without having to ask so your customers can focus on sharing everything else.
